trans-unit.source: Use Face ID to unlock your local Wealth Compass data.
trans-unit.target: Use Face ID to unlock your local Wealth Compass data.

trans-unit.id: %@ Cached or fallback rates remain active.
trans-unit.source: %@ Cached or fallback rates remain active.
trans-unit.target: %@ Cached or fallback rates remain active.

trans-unit.id: %@ is scheduled. Open Wealth Compass to review it.
trans-unit.source: %@ is scheduled. Open Wealth Compass to review it.
trans-unit.target: %@ is scheduled. Open Wealth Compass to review it.

trans-unit.id: %@: %@. Wealth Compass records it automatically when the app is active.
trans-unit.source: %1$@: %2$@. Wealth Compass records it automatically when the app is active.
trans-unit.target: %1$@: %2$@. Wealth Compass records it automatically when the app is active.

trans-unit.id: %@: %@. Wealth Compass records it while the app is active.
trans-unit.source: %1$@: %2$@. Wealth Compass records it while the app is active.
trans-unit.target: %1$@: %2$@. Wealth Compass records it while the app is active.

trans-unit.id: %lld due transaction%@ added to Cash Flow.
trans-unit.source: %1$lld due transaction%2$@ added to Cash Flow.
trans-unit.target: %1$lld due transaction%2$@ added to Cash Flow.

trans-unit.id: %lld more transactions hidden by this view.
trans-unit.source: %lld more transactions hidden by this view.
trans-unit.target: %lld more transactions hidden by this view.

trans-unit.id: A clear view of what you own, owe, earn, and spend.
trans-unit.source: A clear view of what you own, owe, earn, and spend.
trans-unit.target: A clear view of what you own, owe, earn, and spend.

trans-unit.id: API keys are verified against a live quote before they are stored in the macOS Keychain.
trans-unit.source: API keys are verified against a live quote before they are stored in the macOS Keychain.
trans-unit.target: API keys are verified against a live quote before they are stored in the macOS Keychain.

trans-unit.id: Add a holding to track its value and performance.
trans-unit.source: Add a holding to track its value and performance.
trans-unit.target: Add a holding to track its value and performance.

trans-unit.id: Add a holding to track its value.
trans-unit.source: Add a holding to track its value.
trans-unit.target: Add a holding to track its value.

trans-unit.id: Add another snapshot to see movement
trans-unit.source: Add another snapshot to see movement
trans-unit.target: Add another snapshot to see movement

trans-unit.id: Add another snapshot to see movement over time
trans-unit.source: Add another snapshot to see movement over time
trans-unit.target: Add another snapshot to see movement over time

trans-unit.id: Add stocks, ETFs, bonds, or other positions.
trans-unit.source: Add stocks, ETFs, bonds, or other positions.
trans-unit.target: Add stocks, ETFs, bonds, or other positions.

trans-unit.id: Biometric authentication is not available on this Mac.
trans-unit.source: Biometric authentication is not available on this Mac.
trans-unit.target: Biometric authentication is not available on this Mac.

trans-unit.id: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.
trans-unit.source: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.
trans-unit.target: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.

trans-unit.id: Checking the iCloud account and preparing CloudKit.
trans-unit.source: Checking the iCloud account and preparing CloudKit.
trans-unit.target: Checking the iCloud account and preparing CloudKit.

trans-unit.id: Due schedules are recorded automatically while the app is active and caught up the next time it opens.
trans-unit.source: Due schedules are recorded automatically while the app is active and caught up the next time it opens.
trans-unit.target: Due schedules are recorded automatically while the app is active and caught up the next time it opens.

trans-unit.id: Due schedules catch up on open
trans-unit.source: Due schedules catch up on open
trans-unit.target: Due schedules catch up on open

trans-unit.id: ECB reference rates are refreshed automatically and cached locally for offline use.
trans-unit.source: ECB reference rates are refreshed automatically and cached locally for offline use.
trans-unit.target: ECB reference rates are refreshed automatically and cached locally for offline use.

trans-unit.id: Enable biometric protection for Wealth Compass.
trans-unit.source: Enable biometric protection for Wealth Compass.
trans-unit.target: Enable biometric protection for Wealth Compass.

trans-unit.id: Enter the broker or platform fee charged for this investment transaction. It is added to the position cost basis.
trans-unit.source: Enter the broker or platform fee charged for this investment transaction. It is added to the position cost basis.
trans-unit.target: Enter the broker or platform fee charged for this investment transaction. It is added to the position cost basis.

trans-unit.id: Enter your free API keys to get live stock and crypto prices. This is highly recommended—otherwise, asset prices won't be real or up to date.
trans-unit.source: Enter your free API keys to get live stock and crypto prices. This is highly recommended—otherwise, asset prices won't be real or up to date.
trans-unit.target: Enter your free API keys to get live stock and crypto prices. This is highly recommended—otherwise, asset prices won't be real or up to date.

trans-unit.id: Local data is ready to sync.
trans-unit.source: Local data is ready to sync.
trans-unit.target: Local data is ready to sync.

trans-unit.id: Merge adds new records and updates matching IDs. Replace clears current local finance data before importing.
trans-unit.source: Merge adds new records and updates matching IDs. Replace clears current local finance data before importing.
trans-unit.target: Merge adds new records and updates matching IDs. Replace clears current local finance data before importing.

trans-unit.id: Privacy, sync, currency, and market data
trans-unit.source: Privacy, sync, currency, and market data
trans-unit.target: Privacy, sync, currency, and market data

trans-unit.id: Record cash flow or add a position to bring this dashboard to life.
trans-unit.source: Record cash flow or add a position to bring this dashboard to life.
trans-unit.target: Record cash flow or add a position to bring this dashboard to life.

trans-unit.id: Record cash flow or add a position. Wealth Compass will create snapshots and fill this dashboard automatically.
trans-unit.source: Record cash flow or add a position. Wealth Compass will create snapshots and fill this dashboard automatically.
trans-unit.target: Record cash flow or add a position. Wealth Compass will create snapshots and fill this dashboard automatically.

trans-unit.id: Sending local changes and fetching updates from iCloud.
trans-unit.source: Sending local changes and fetching updates from iCloud.
trans-unit.target: Sending local changes and fetching updates from iCloud.

trans-unit.id: The broker or platform fee is added to the position cost basis.
trans-unit.source: The broker or platform fee is added to the position cost basis.
trans-unit.target: The broker or platform fee is added to the position cost basis.

trans-unit.id: The category will be saved for future %@ transactions.
trans-unit.source: The category will be saved for future %@ transactions.
trans-unit.target: The category will be saved for future %@ transactions.

trans-unit.id: The iCloud account changed. Sync was disabled to prevent data from crossing accounts. Enable it again to sync with the current account.
trans-unit.source: The iCloud account changed. Sync was disabled to prevent data from crossing accounts. Enable it again to sync with the current account.
trans-unit.target: The iCloud account changed. Sync was disabled to prevent data from crossing accounts. Enable it again to sync with the current account.

trans-unit.id: The key is saved only after %@ returns a live USD price.
trans-unit.source: The key is saved only after %@ returns a live USD price.
trans-unit.target: The key is saved only after %@ returns a live USD price.

trans-unit.id: The stored credential will be deleted from the macOS Keychain.
trans-unit.source: The stored credential will be deleted from the macOS Keychain.
trans-unit.target: The stored credential will be deleted from the macOS Keychain.

trans-unit.id: This permanently removes %@ from your crypto portfolio.
trans-unit.source: This permanently removes %@ from your crypto portfolio.
trans-unit.target: This permanently removes %@ from your crypto portfolio.

trans-unit.id: This permanently removes %@ from your investment portfolio.
trans-unit.source: This permanently removes %@ from your investment portfolio.
trans-unit.target: This permanently removes %@ from your investment portfolio.

trans-unit.id: Unlock your local Wealth Compass data.
trans-unit.source: Unlock your local Wealth Compass data.
trans-unit.target: Unlock your local Wealth Compass data.

trans-unit.id: We don't use central servers. All your financial data is stored locally on your device or in your private iCloud. To track live market prices for your assets, you will connect directly to data providers.
trans-unit.source: We don't use central servers. All your financial data is stored locally on your device or in your private iCloud. To track live market prices for your assets, you will connect directly to data providers.
trans-unit.target: We don't use central servers. All your financial data is stored locally on your device or in your private iCloud. To track live market prices for your assets, you will connect directly to data providers.

trans-unit.id: When enabled, Wealth Compass locks whenever the app leaves the foreground.
trans-unit.source: When enabled, Wealth Compass locks whenever the app leaves the foreground.
trans-unit.target: When enabled, Wealth Compass locks whenever the app leaves the foreground.

trans-unit.id: Your data remains on this device.
trans-unit.source: Your data remains on this device.
trans-unit.target: Your data remains on this device.

trans-unit.id: Your financial data stays available locally and syncs across your devices through your private CloudKit database.
trans-unit.source: Your financial data stays available locally and syncs across your devices through your private CloudKit database.
trans-unit.target: Your financial data stays available locally and syncs across your devices through your private CloudKit database.

trans-unit.id: Your personal compass for tracking cash flow, investments, and expenses all in one beautifully designed dashboard.
trans-unit.source: Your personal compass for tracking cash flow, investments, and expenses all in one beautifully designed dashboard.
trans-unit.target: Your personal compass for tracking cash flow, investments, and expenses all in one beautifully designed dashboard.
